code:
type TxError =
  | Overdraft

value Account
  balance: Int
end

fn deposit(_ a: Account, _ amount: Int) -> Account
  a.copy(balance: a.balance + amount)
end

fn withdraw(_ a: Account, _ amount: Int) -> Result<Account, TxError>
  if amount > a.balance
    Err(TxError.Overdraft)
  else
    Ok(a.copy(balance: a.balance - amount))
  end
end

mut acct = Account(balance: 100)
mut status = "ok"

acct = deposit(acct, 50)
status = "ok"

match withdraw(acct, 30)
when Ok(next)
  acct = next
  status = "ok"
when Err(_)
  status = "overdraft"
end

match withdraw(acct, 500)
when Ok(next)
  acct = next
  status = "ok"
when Err(_)
  status = "overdraft"
end

println("final_balance=#{acct.balance}")
println("last_status=#{status}")
